Toward Employment

- Goals
- Tasks
- Objectives

Things I want to get done…

- … machine learning and ai
- … web dev
- … graphics modeling design & animation
- … technical prep

Types of work…

- Input
    - research
- Output
    - writing

Things I need to get done to get a job…

- website
- 2-3 substantial projects… so that means wrapping up or completing 2-3 project design and implementations
- 

Things that interest me…


Things that …
